title: themelium loherianum
intro: Themelium loherianum, also known as Lheria fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and fever due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Themelium loherianum include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs. Themelium loherianum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
